case_title: RODNEY MILES ET AL VS. DAVEY EXPERT TREE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) RODNEY MILES** APPEARING ON BEHALF OF ANN MILES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILES, RODNEY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2023 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILES, RODNEY AS TO DEFENDANT DAVEY EXPERT TREE COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-02-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DAVEY EXPERT TREE COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILES, RODNEY MILES, ANN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DAVEY EXPERT TREE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) [HEARING - JUNE 20, 2023 AT 1:30PM] FILED BY DEFENDANT DAVEY EXPERT TREE COMPANY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS DENIED. [HEARING - JUNE-20-2023 AT 1:30 PM]
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ADAM JENSEN, DISTRICT MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT DAVEY EXPERT TREE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF RODNEY MILES (HUSBAND) IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ANN MILES IS NOT PRESENT, PLAINTIFF RODNEY MILES (HUSBAND) APPEARING ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF ANN MILES (WIFE). DEFENDANT DAVEY EXPERT TREE COMPANY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ADAM JENSEN (DISTRICT MANAGER). PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,144.00 FILED BY MILES, RODNEY MILES, ANN AS TO DEFENDANT DAVEY EXPERT TREE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
